name: NixOS
description: NixOS takes a completely different approach to Linux: your entire system — every package, every config file, every service — is declared in a single configuration file. This means your system is fully reproducible, trivially rollback-able, and consistent across machines. The Nix package manager is the largest package repository in existence. The learning curve is steep, but the payoff for developers and sysadmins who value reproducibility is enormous.
